name: yibubu-houchang
description: 后场一步步 Android packaging project

scripts.cap:sync: powershell -NoProfile -Command "npm run prepare:web; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npx cap sync android"
scripts.android:apk: powershell -NoProfile -Command "npm run prepare:web; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npx cap sync android; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Set-Location android; .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug"
